arts.sum: PSG got their Club World Cup campaign off to the perfect start as they eased to a 4-0 win over Atletico Madrid. Botafogo also made a winning start to the competition as they beat Seattle Sounders 2-1...

arts.ttl: Is PSG vs Botafogo on TV? How to watch Club World Cup games for free
arts.sum: European champions PSG will face Copa Libertadores holders Botafogo in one of the biggest games of the tournament so far
